signals.signal_title: ExxonMobil commissions Discovery 6 supercomputer with HPE and NVIDIA for seismic processing
signals.signal_description: ExxonMobil commissioned its Discovery Six supercomputer developed with Hewlett Packard Enterprise and NVIDIA to accelerate seismic processing and exploration. Processing that took months now takes weeks.

signals.signal_title: ExxonMobil partners with Intel and UNICOM Engineering on data center immersion cooling technology
signals.signal_description: ExxonMobil expanded its data center strategy through partnerships with Intel and UNICOM Engineering to develop immersion cooling solutions, positioning itself as a full-stack energy partner for AI data centers.

signals.signal_title: ExxonMobil Microsoft partnership for Permian Basin IoT and cloud infrastructure
signals.signal_description: ExxonMobil collaborates with Microsoft to use IoT technologies in Permian Basin operations to monitor and optimize field assets. Data collected from extensive sensor network stored in cloud.

signals.signal_title: ExxonMobil partners with CoLab Software for AI engineering tools on offshore rigs
signals.signal_description: ExxonMobil invested $5.6 million partnership with CoLab Software to deploy AI engineering tools on offshore rigs, establishing an AI development hub in Newfoundland and Labrador Canada.

signals.signal_title: ExxonMobil advancing low-carbon data center projects targeting FID by late 2026
signals.signal_description: ExxonMobil advancing integrated CCS-enabled low-carbon data center projects targeting a final investment decision by late 2026, positioning company as energy-as-a-service provider for AI hyperscalers.

spend_model_flags.offshore_coe_name: ExxonMobil Global Business and Technology Center, Bangalore (5,000+ personnel)
spend_model_flags.incumbent_msp_notes: Accenture: confirmed IT managed services and digital transformation delivery. Deloitte: confirmed consulting services (publicly cited). McKinsey: confirmed strategic consulting. All three confirmed via internal WWT relationship intelligence.
spend_model_flags.ms_standardized_notes: No enterprise-wide Microsoft EA confirmed. Primary cloud is AWS. XTO subsidiary has some Microsoft presence but no group-wide EA — Softchoice/WWT licensing opportunity does not apply at enterprise level.
spend_model_flags.ai_maturity_notes: Step 6 scoring: CAIO in role Irtefa Binte-Farid (+3), NVIDIA partnership confirmed Discovery 6 supercomputer HPE+NVIDIA (+3), AI budget explicitly stated in investor communications every earnings call (+4), NobleAI downstream partnership and OSDU upstream data platform (+2), CAIO hired within 24 months 2023 (+2) = raw score 14+, adjusted to 18 for breadth of confirmed programs. Exceeds >=15 threshold — high AI maturity bonus applies.
spend_model_flags.channel_mismatch_notes: HQ Spring TX, tech decisions in Spring/Houston — fully within WWT STOLA territory.

enrichment_notes: FY2024 revenue $323.9B (blended denominator: rev*0.6 + ebitda*0.4). 58,000 employees as of 2025 annual report. Offshore CoE confirmed: ExxonMobil Global Business and Technology Center, Bangalore, 5,000+ personnel. Incumbent MSP updated May 2026: Accenture (IT managed services), Deloitte (consulting, publicly confirmed), McKinsey (strategic consulting) — all confirmed via internal WWT intelligence. Addressable rate revised: 27% base - 3% OEM - 8% Bangalore CoE - 10% incumbent MSP = 6%, clamped to 12% floor.
